headline: Sydney Police Embarrassed After Mistaking 85-Year-Old Grandpa for International Crime Lord, Demand His Immediate Safe Return

posts.twitter: Sydney cops kidnap an 85-year-old grandpa by mistake, then plead for his safe return—no apology so far! Crime lord? More like confused corduroy. #Oops #SydneyStory Read more:
posts.facebook: What do you do when you accidentally kidnap an 85-year-old grandpa instead of an international crime lord? If you're Sydney police, you plead for his safe return but skip the apology! Have you ever seen a mix-up this epic? #MistakenIdentity #SydneyNews #PoliceBlunder
posts.linkedin: Sydney Police recently demonstrated a unique approach to law enforcement by kidnapping an 85-year-old man mistaken for a crime lord—and now are asking for his safe return without issuing an apology. It’s a cautionary tale on the importance of accurate intelligence and accountability. #LawEnforcement #Accountability #Leadership
posts.instagram: When you accidentally kidnap an 85-year-old grandpa instead of a crime lord... Sydney police are now begging for his safe return but still no apology! Grandpa > crime boss any day. 😂 #SydneyPolice #OopsMoment #GrandpaWins #MistakenIdentity #SatireNews #FunnyFails #CrimeGoneWrong #Whoops
posts.threads: Sydney police kidnapped an 85-year-old grandpa by mistake and want him back—still no sorry though. Classic mix-up! #Oops #Sydney
